description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product Details Sage green brassiere, has embroidered floral detail, beige coloured straps with rosette detail, rosette and bow detail in between the cups, low coverage, wired under the cups for support, padded balconette style, satin jacquard fabric, embroidered straps which are adjustable, intricately designed décolleté elastic at the neckline and an adjustable double hook and eye closureMaterial and Care92% polyester and 8% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
